description_long: This is a rugged, double-edged battle axe with a broad, curved blade on one side and a smaller, angular blade on the opposite. The axe head is forged from dark metal, featuring a weathered, matte finish and visible nicks along the cutting edge, suggesting heavy use. The handle is wrapped in a greenish, textured material, likely fabric or leather, providing a secure grip and enhanced comfort. The shaft is slightly curved and reinforced with metal bands, and a tattered strip of cloth dangles from the base, adding to its utilitarian appearance. The overall design is robust and functional, with a focus on durability and effectiveness in demanding urban or survival scenarios. No visible branding or decorative engravings are present, emphasizing its practical, no-nonsense construction.
description: A heavy-duty, double-edged battle axe with a dark, weathered metal head and a green-wrapped, slightly curved handle. The axe features a broad blade, reinforced shaft, and a tattered cloth strip at the base.
description_view_0: The axe is seen from the narrow edge, showing the pointed tip of the blade and the wrapped handle with a dangling cloth strip.
description_view_1: The broad, curved blade and the smaller, angular rear blade are fully visible, along with the reinforced, green-wrapped handle and tattered cloth.
description_view_2: The axe is viewed from the opposite narrow edge, highlighting the thickness of the blade and the cylindrical handle.
description_view_3: The reverse side of the axe head is visible, showing the secondary blade and the full curvature of the handle with its wrapping and cloth strip.
attribute_handle_type: Curved handle wrapped in greenish fabric or leather, cylindrical cross-section, reinforced with metal bands, tattered cloth at the base.
attribute_blade_design: Double-edged with a broad, curved main blade and a smaller, angular rear blade; weathered, matte finish with visible nicks.
attribute_mounting_style: Traditional wedged and reinforced with metal bands.
